facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this. A French bistro on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo that most people on the island have no idea exists. Aigue-Marine French Bistro by Hidden Gem sits at 4.8 stars across 301 reviews and the crowd is almost entirely locals and expats. That ratio tells you everything. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
